scripts.build: rill-agent-bundle build agents/classifier --output dist/classifier && rill-agent-bundle build agents/summarizer --output dist/summarizer && rill-agent-bundle build agents/orchestrator --output dist/orchestrator
scripts.check: rill-agent-bundle check --platform node dist/classifier && rill-agent-bundle check --platform node dist/summarizer && rill-agent-bundle check --platform node dist/orchestrator
